execOfficers.name: Alexander Jackson
execOfficers.description: The Branch Chair provides vision and direction to the branch through bold leadership.

execOfficers.name: Sebastien Pruneau
execOfficers.description: The Vice Chair manages regular branch operations in support of the Branch Chair.

execOfficers.name: Rachel la Madrid
execOfficers.description: The Secretary serves as the knowledge bank and chief correspondent of the Executive Committee.

execOfficers.name: Elizabeth Horn
execOfficers.description: The Secretary serves as the knowledge bank and chief correspondent of the Executive Committee.

execOfficers.name: Anthony Hurlston
execOfficers.description: The Treasurer is responsible for managing funds and conducting fundraising for the branch.

execOfficers.name: Yuzuria Liu
execOfficers.description: The Activities Director organizes and handles logistics for branch events while also serving as a hospitality host to branch guests.

execOfficers.name: Isaac Castor
execOfficers.description: The Chaplain provides spiritual support to our branch while keeping the Executive Committee focused on our mission.

committeeOfficers.name: Gabriel Cioroch
committeeOfficers.description: The Program Committee plans and hosts all regular branch meetings and some regular branch events. The Program Committee is responsible for all arrangements for these meetings and for conducting regular advertisements related to these activities.

committeeOfficers.name: Amelia Wu
committeeOfficers.description: The Publicity Committee is a team specializing in writing and graphical art that focuses on polishing our branch aesthetics. The Publicity Committee is also responsible for increasing public awareness of our branch by conducting special advertising campaigns, by writing articles, and by creating promotional materials.

committeeOfficers.name: Josiah Doering
committeeOfficers.description: The Membership Committee serves our members on a more personal level by operating our member support activities such as our STEM study hall. The Membership Committee also serves as the branch recruitment wing by representing the branch at college events.

committeeOfficers.name: Amber Wong
committeeOfficers.description: The History Committee is dedicated to preserving our story for future generations of students. The committee gathers, writes, and stores records of branch activities. The History Committee is also responsible for writing an ongoing narrative history of the branch.

committeeOfficers.name: Christian Kahnke
committeeOfficers.description: The Prayer Committee is the power source of all branch efforts. We believe firmly in a personal God who created the universe, earth, and humanity. As a team of Christians, our prayer committee is tasked with organizing dedicated times to ask our God for wisdom, strength, and help as we seek to advance technology for the benefit of humanity.

councilor.name: Mr. Joseph Coffey
councilor.description: The branch councilor supports our branch by providing guidance to branch leadership, by assisting branch efforts to collaborate with our college, and by providing a crucial connection to the North-West Florida professional section.
